title: isbn NOT NULL UNIQUE not validated — duplicate/omitted isbn returns opaque 500
evidence: app.go:55 schema declares `isbn TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE`, but validateBook (app.go:77) only checks title/author; a second create with the same or empty isbn hits the UNIQUE constraint and app.go:114-116 returns generic `500 failed to create book`
suggestion: Validate isbn presence and map the SQLite constraint error to 400/409 with a clear message

title: scanBook is dead code
evidence: app.go:67 defines scanBook but it is never called (getBook/updateBook use QueryRow(...).Scan inline)
suggestion: Remove scanBook or use it in the query handlers

title: Unreachable log line after blocking r.Run
evidence: app.go:318 `r.Run(":8080")` blocks; the `fmt.Println` on app.go:319 is never reached
suggestion: Move the startup log before r.Run or drop it
